title: KIR-016 Mizuki Yayoi's mischievous life with her niece who came to Tokyo from Hakata
description: Mizuki enrolled in a preparatory school in Tokyo with the aim of becoming a first-class university. However, I decided to stay at my uncle's house until the renovation of the women's dormitory where I was planning to live was completed. Seriously, I'm curious about sex ... "Uncle, can I live here all the time? Then I'll have sex every day ..." [* The image and sound may be disturbed, but please note that this is not a defect of the product itself.]
